statements.query: MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:AWSOrganization{id: $ORGANIZATION_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:AWSAccount{id: $AWS_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(:AWSPrincipal)-[r:POLICY]->(:AWSPolicy) WHERE r.unused_permissions IS NOT NULL REMOVE r.unused_permissions return COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted
statements.__comment__: Delete AWS principals unused permissions for policy

statements.query: MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:AWSOrganization{id: $ORGANIZATION_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:AWSAccount{id: $AWS_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(:AWSPrincipal)-[r:POLICY]->(:AWSPolicy) WHERE r.used_permissions IS NOT NULL REMOVE r.used_permissions return COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted
statements.__comment__: Delete AWS principals used permissions for policy

statements.query: MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:AWSOrganization{id: $ORGANIZATION_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(:AWSPrincipal)<-[:ASSIGNED_TO]-(:AWSPermissionSet)-[r:ATTACHED_TO]->(aa:AWSAccount{id: $AWS_ID}) WHERE r.unused_permissions IS NOT NULL REMOVE r.unused_permissions return COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted
statements.__comment__: Delete AWS SSO principals unused permissions for permission set

statements.query: MATCH (cw:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(org:AWSOrganization{id: $ORGANIZATION_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(:AWSPrincipal)<-[:ASSIGNED_TO]-(:AWSPermissionSet)-[r:ATTACHED_TO]->(aa:AWSAccount{id: $AWS_ID}) WHERE r.used_permissions IS NOT NULL REMOVE r.used_permissions return COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted
statements.__comment__: Delete AWS SSO principals used permissions for permission set

name: cleanup AWS iam principals used and unused properties for policies
